title: [Emberstone Hall, Workshop]
description: Basalt steps rise toward a passage at one end of this half-subterranean chamber, its walls hewn from the island's dark volcanic stone.  Invar brackets and fittings lend the space a distinctly dwarven character, their red-speckled black surfaces complementing the surrounding rock.  A invar-fitted workbench dominates one wall, flanked by a grinder and polisher, while several sketches of hammer and blade designs have been tacked above it.  A heavy invar-banded door stands opposite the steps.
room.location: Emberstone Hall (Forge), inside the island town of Mist Harbor
